name: Crockpot Chicken Kona
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the chicken in a crockpot.
3. Combine green onions, soy sauce, and water in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 3-4 hours or until the chicken is rendered.
6. Remove the chicken from the pot.
7. Arrange the chicken on a broiler pan.
8. Brush honey over the chicken.
9. Broil until golden brown, brushing with honey several times.
Note: Chicken and sauce may be refrigerated and browned at a later time if desired.
